question: Will SATS's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21? Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price. Resolution criteria: Resolves to the market close price at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SATS for the resolution date. If the resolution date coincides with a day the market is closed (weekend, holiday, etc.) the previous market close price is used. Background: EchoStar Corporation provides pay-tv services in the United States, Mexico, Canada, South and Central America, Asia, Africa, Australia, Europe, India, and the Middle East. The Pay-TV segment offers a direct broadcast and fixed satellite, owned and leased satellites, leased fiber optic networks, in-home services, and call center operation services; digital broadcast operations, including satellite uplinking/downlinking, transmission and, other services to third-party pay-TV providers; multichannel, live-linear and on-demand streaming over-the-top Internet-based domestic, international, Latino, and Freestream video programming services; and receiver systems. Its Wireless segment provides wireless communication services and products; and a range of wireless devices. The Broadband and Satellite Services offers broadband satellite technologies, and internet products and services to consumer customers, including home and small to medium-sized businesses; managed services, equipment, hardware, satellite services, and communications solutions to government and enterprise customers, as well as to the unserved and underserved consumer, enterprise, aeronautical, and government markets; and integrated multi-transport solutions that enable airline and airline service providers to deliver in-flight network connectivity. This segment also designs, provides, and installs gateway and terminal equipment to customers for other satellite systems; and designs, develops, constructs, and provides telecommunication networks comprising satellite ground segment systems and terminals to mobile system operators and enterprise customers. Its Other segment consists of 5G network and 5G network deployment operations. The company sells its products and services under the Boost Mobile, DISH, Gen Mobile, Hughes, Hughesnet, and Sling brands. The company was formerly known as EchoStar Holding Corporation. EchoStar Corporation was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Englewood, Colorado.

evidences.title: Echostar (SATS) Analysis - Vantix Research
evidences.content: ∙ Paid #### Introduction: EchoStar Corporation is a satellite communications and connectivity company that, as of early 2024, merged with DISH Network to form a diversified telecom entity. The combined company operates a broad range of businesses, from satellite broadband and defense communications (Hughes Network Systems), to consumer satellite TV and streaming (DISH TV and Sling TV), to mobile wireless service (Boost Mobile). Until recently, EchoStar was burdened with heavy debt and a precarious financial position. Entering 2025, it had nearly $27B in debt, was burning cash (about -$2B free cash flow annually), and faced an FCC investigation into unused spectrum. Bankruptcy concerns loomed as legacy businesses declined and an ambitious 5G network buildout strained resources. [...] Future Catalysts: Frankly, there are not many growth catalysts for the legacy satellite TV arm, the focus will be on managing its decline profitably. EchoStar could attempt to merge or partner this segment with a similar player (the long rumored DISH/DirecTV merger idea) to squeeze out cost synergies, though now that Dish is fully under EchoStar, any such deal would have to involve AT&T (which co-own...

evidences.content: ### What is EchoStar Corporation's business model? EchoStar Corporation generates revenue through three main segments: Pay-TV, Retail Wireless, and Broadband and Satellite Services. It offers multichannel video programming and streaming services via brands like DISH TV and Sling TV, while providing retail wireless services through Boost Mobile. Additionally, its Hughes division delivers satellite internet and managed network services to a variety of customers, including residential, enterprise, and government sectors. ### What is the highest forecasted price for SATS EchoStar Corporation? The highest price target for SATS is $161.00 from at , which represents a 58.6% increase from the current price of $101.49. evidences.title: EchoStar Corp Company Profile - EchoStar Corp Overview - GlobalData
evidences.content: EchoStar Corp (EchoStar) is a provider of satellite communication solutions. The company offers broadband internet products, broadband equipment, hardware products and installation gateway and terminal equipment and communications solutions. Its service offerings include pay TV, satellite network, wireless services, broadband service, communications services and managed services. EchoStar also provides other technologies including geostationary high throughput satellites, low-earth orbit networks, medium-earth orbit systems. It provides services under Boost Mobile, Hughesnet, Hughes, Dish and Sling brand names. The company serves various industries including enterprise, aeronautical, consumer, business and government.
